subject: test(components): close coverage gaps + add CI workflow + apply non-breaking audit fixes
body:
Follow-up to tier-4 test infrastructure. Plugs the gaps I called out in
the wrap reflection, lands CI so the suite is enforced, and applies the
non-breaking slice of npm audit fixes.

Coverage gaps closed (3 additions):
- ToneSelector: added tone-pill click-to-toggle test (the primary
  interaction tier-4 didn't cover) plus over-limit disabled-pill
  click-ignored regression.
- TextArea: added the className-merge assertion that Input had but
  TextArea was missing — parallel files stay parallel.
- BurgerMenu: new test file (6 tests) covering closed state, open via
  trigger, Escape-closes (load-bearing useEscapeKey + close
  useCallback regression), reopen-after-Escape (listener-leak
  regression), close-then-act 150ms delay with fake timers, keepOpen
  items fire without closing.

Documentation:
- Toast "unstable onDone" test annotated as a CONTRACT test, not a
  Toast-bug regression — it documents React's effect-re-run
  semantics that justify the useCallback KEEP on `clearToast`.
- vite.config.ts: one-line cross-reference to vitest.config.ts at the
  config block so readers don't hunt for test config.

CI enforcement:
- .github/workflows/ci.yml: single-job pipeline on ubuntu-latest,
  Node 20. Runs `npm ci` → `npm run lint` → `npm run build` →
  `npm test` on push to main + every PR. `concurrency` group cancels
  in-flight runs on new pushes to the same ref. Without this, the
  83-test suite was advisory; now it's binding.

npm audit fixes:
- `npm audit fix` applied (non-breaking). 6 of 10 advisories
  resolved; package-lock.json updates land here. 4 HIGH advisories
  remain, all in the build-toolchain transitive chain
  (serialize-javascript → @rollup/plugin-terser → workbox-build →
  vite-plugin-pwa) — build-time only, not runtime-reachable. TODO.md
  gets a "Build-Toolchain Security" section tracking the remediation
  path (wait for upstream vite-plugin-pwa or `audit fix --force`).

Test count: 83/83 passing (was 80/83; the 3 dist-level icon
cache-bust tests now run because CI builds before testing).
tsc -b clean, eslint clean, npm run build clean.

Tags: testing, ci, security, documentation
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: custom-code-reduction
Semver: patch
